PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WING WO, THOMAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, JOYCE BARRETT, TODD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WING WO, THOMAS WING WO, CHARLENE $3,088.85 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,143.85, DEFENDANTS ARE DIRECTED TO PAY THE JUDGMENT TO THE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ACCOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
